TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Tonoz, title = Tonoz, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tonoz} }

S.FORM: == satangahan : == tunuz u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam :糯米糰 u canan ku tunuz(tunuz是什麼?)ː sapihica ku tunuz(tunuz做什麼?)ː namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ː == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ː ==
S.PHON: == sataŋaħan : == tunuz u zuma a kamu : nu ħur~ɾam :*** u ʦanan ku tunuz(tunuz***?)* sapiħiʦa ku tunuz(tunuz***?)* namakajniaj a nasur~ɾitan nasakamuan atu natinəŋan * == mar~ɾaar~ɾitin tu i ħəkar~ɾaj atu zumaaj a natinəŋan * ==
S.FORM: == satangahan : == tunuz u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam :糯米糰 u canan ku tunuz(tunuz是什麼?)ː sapihica ku tunuz(tunuz做什麼?)ː namakayniay a nasulitan nasakamuan atu natinengan ː == malaalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ː ==
S.PHON: == sataŋaħan : == tunuz u zuma a kamu : nu ħur~ɾam :*** u ʦanan ku tunuz(tunuz***?)* sapiħiʦa ku tunuz(tunuz***?)* namakajniaj a nasur~ɾitan nasakamuan atu natinəŋan * == mar~ɾaar~ɾitin tu i ħəkar~ɾaj atu zumaaj a natinəŋan * ==
